{{Expand}}

{{Infobox technique
| name = Silverscale Iron body
| introduced = cradle-08-wintersteel
}}

== Wintersteel ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|The [[Silverscale Iron body]] is a technique common for fishermen that fortifies spirit control and provides resistance to spiritual attacks.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c21">''Wintersteel'', chapter 21</ref>}}

== Threshold: Stories from Cradle ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[Silverscale Iron body]] is a type of body or defense possessed by [[Yan Shoumei]].<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c3">''Threshold: Stories from Cradle'', chapter 3</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

[[Category:Techniques]]
[[Category:Wintersteel]]
[[Category:Threshold: Stories from Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
